import string
import io

let text = io.read_to_end()
mut count = 0
mut in_word = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(text)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    in_word = false
  else
    if not in_word
      count = count + 1
      in_word = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("#{count}")
